writers.lyricist: Selena Gomez/Marshmello/Andrew Wotman/Louis Bell/Brian D. Lee/Alexandra Tamposi/Carl Rosen
writers.composer: Selena Gomez/Marshmello/Andrew Wotman/Louis Bell/Brian D. Lee/Alexandra Tamposi/Carl Rosen

lyrics.text: In your eyes, there's a heavy blue
lyrics.translation: 在你的眼眸中，那充满了忧郁

lyrics.text: One to love, and one to lose
lyrics.translation: 左眼蕴藏爱意 右眼闪烁黯然

lyrics.text: Sweet divine, a heavy truth
lyrics.translation: 于甜蜜中却预感到事实的沉重

lyrics.text: Water or wine, don't make me choose
lyrics.translation: 水还是酒,别把我逼到两难的境地

lyrics.text: I wanna feel the way that we did that summer night, night
lyrics.translation: 我只想重温我们曾一起共度的仲夏之夜

lyrics.text: Drunk on a feeling, alone with the stars in the sky
lyrics.translation: 独自在醉意朦胧间仰望繁星点点

lyrics.text: I've been running through the jungle
lyrics.translation: 我在丛林中不断奔跑

lyrics.text: I've been running with the wolves
lyrics.translation: 我和狼群一同前行

lyrics.text: To get to you, to get to you
lyrics.translation: 只为追寻你 前往你身旁

lyrics.text: I've been down the darkest alleys
lyrics.translation: 我一路沿着墨色浓重的小径前行

lyrics.text: Saw the dark side of the moon
lyrics.translation: 甚至都看到了月球的背面

lyrics.text: To get to you, to get to you
lyrics.translation: 只为追寻你 前往你身旁

lyrics.text: I've looked for love in every stranger
lyrics.translation: 我在每个过客的心中搜索爱的踪迹

lyrics.text: Took too much to ease the anger
lyrics.translation: 喝下太多的酒才稍稍缓解心头之愤

lyrics.text: All for you, yeah, all for you
lyrics.translation: 都是为了你 都是因为你

lyrics.text: I've been running through the jungle
lyrics.translation: 我在丛林中不断奔跑

lyrics.text: I've been crying with the wolves
lyrics.translation: 我和狼群一起嗥鸣

lyrics.text: To get to you, to get to you, only get to you
lyrics.translation: 只为追寻你 前往你身旁 将你找寻

lyrics.text: only get to you
lyrics.translation: 只为追寻你

lyrics.text: only get to you
lyrics.translation: 只为追寻你

lyrics.text: Your fingertips trace my skin
lyrics.translation: 你的指尖摩挲着我的肌肤

lyrics.text: To places I have never been
lyrics.translation: 带我去领略从未踏足之境

lyrics.text: Blindly, I am following
lyrics.translation: 我就这样不假思索地盲从

lyrics.text: Break down these walls and come on in
lyrics.translation: 越过这垒垒高墙 一窥其中奥妙

lyrics.text: I wanna feel the way that we did that summer night, night
lyrics.translation: 我只想重温我们曾一起共度的仲夏之夜
